validation_warnings.description: Lifecycle validation warnings. Interactive runs treat explicit final/pending branches as the formal contract, but phase-5 compatibility paths may still emit INTERACTIVE_COMPLETED_WITHOUT_DONE_MARKER, INTERACTIVE_OUTPUT_EXTRACTED_BUT_SCHEMA_INVALID, and INTERACTIVE_SOFT_COMPLETION_SCHEMA_TOO_PERMISSIVE.

code.description: Stable diagnostic warning code. Interactive phase-5 compatibility paths may continue to emit INTERACTIVE_COMPLETED_WITHOUT_DONE_MARKER, INTERACTIVE_OUTPUT_EXTRACTED_BUT_SCHEMA_INVALID, or INTERACTIVE_SOFT_COMPLETION_SCHEMA_TOO_PERMISSIVE.
